description: This file defines and exports immutable values, configuration settings, and shared static data used throughout the application to ensure consistency and maintainability.
This file serves as the primary entry point for a TypeScript module or application, typically used to export public APIs or initialize the codebase.
This file serves as a central export point or barrel file that aggregates and re-exports various data validation or database schemas defined within the directory.
This file likely manages the connection to the application's database and provides utility functions for executing queries and managing data persistence.
This file likely manages the integration and communication with Google's Gemini API, providing functions to send prompts and receive AI-generated responses.
This script provides a utility to initialize and store new memory entries, likely for use by an AI agent or within a persistent data storage system.
This script provides a utility for searching and locating specific files within the project directory based on defined criteria or patterns.
This script scans and processes the project's source files to generate a searchable index or metadata repository of the codebase.
This script likely initializes or tracks the status of setup processes and environment configurations for the project's development tools.
This file likely implements a tool for retrieving stored information or historical context from a memory system.
This file defines the TypeScript interfaces, types, and enums used to enforce data structures and provide type safety across the codebase.
This file likely implements a web server responsible for serving the frontend application and handling server-side rendering or API requests.
This file implements JWT-based authentication logic, including token generation, refreshing, and middleware for securing application routes.
This middleware validates JSON Web Tokens to secure application routes and ensure that only authenticated users can access protected endpoints.
This file defines the authentication API endpoints for login, logout, and token refreshing using JWT. It also integrates middleware to manage route protection and secure user sessions.
